notes: Compressed proxy of a real long agentic mistral-vibe session: 4 tool-eliciting turns. The live 336-event transcript (session_20260706_101952_48e134e3: 10 users, 158 assistant tool_call msgs, 158 tool results, all auto-agreed, 0 rejected) replays as a clean per-turn working→ready arc with 0 flickers. Parser keeps the session WORKING across every intra-turn assistant_message/tool_result boundary and settles to turn_done only on the terminal text-only assistant. BACKFLOW (live recording): mistral-vibe is a presession adapter — a transient proc-<PID> row is born ready before the real session_<id> transcript dir appears, then reconciles to a DIFFERENT session_id, so the birth is modeled as two phases (presession_birth → session_birth new_session) templated from the codex sibling, with every post-birth turn phase anchored same_session_as session_birth. OBSERVATIONS reduced to agent-only (cost_nonzero=false, tokens_nonzero=false): the offline replay golden stages only transcript.jsonl, so vibe's meta.json sidecar model + tokens are unverifiable offline (same as kiro-cli). Final state ready.

text: proc-<PID> pre-session appears in ready within 1s of launch (PID bound before the transcript dir exists)
Real session_<id> reconciles (different session_id) when the transcript directory appears, born ready
vibe PID bound to the real session (matched by cwd)
Turn 1 ends; working → ready (multiple tool_call/result pairs stay working, no intra-turn flicker)
Final turn ends; working → ready. Session reaches ready and stays there.
